title: Reusable Premium Vehicle Poster
sourceTitle: Electric Grand Tourer Vanta Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable premium vehicle poster with premium vehicle poster with dramatic product angle, clean environment, and polished campaign finish. Position the vehicle as the dominant centerpiece in a bold three-quarter side angle, visually striking and commanding full attention. Layer in crisp premium typography featuring the brand name, model designation, performance figures, horsepower rating, 0-60 time, top speed, engine d. Product: fictional electric grand tourer called VANTA GT-X. Performance Details: 820 horsepower, 0-60 in 2.7 seconds, 212 mph top speed, dual-motor torque vectoring. Heritage Motifs: ghost blueprint lines, circuit-map overlays, velocity graphics, and collector-print details. Poster Layout: dominant three-quarter side angle, crisp spec blocks, oversized model name, and magazine-grade negative space. Paint Palette: liquid silver, racing red accents, bright white highlights, and vivid cobalt reflections. Typography System: premium motorsport sans-serif with performance figures integrated around the car. Subject: Make fictional electric grand tourer called VANTA GT-X the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use dominant three-quarter side angle, crisp spec blocks, oversized model name, and magazine-grade negative space. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in premium automotive poster visual finish preserving these source cues: dominant vehicle hero angle, performance typography and spec blocks, motorsport heritage/blueprint motifs. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use liquid silver, racing red accents, bright white highlights, and vivid cobalt reflections. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
